title: 7A21--GAIT Analysis Machine (Medical Research) Intent to Sole Source

statement_of_work: The Department of Veterans Affairs, VISN 12, Network Contracting Office (NCO) 12, intends to issue a sole source purchase order to Stoelting Co., the exclusive authorized U.S. distributor of the Ugo Basile G.A.I.T. (Gait Analysis and Imaging Tool) system. This acquisition is for a commercial, integrated gait analysis platform required by the William S.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the 7A21--GAIT Analysis Machine (Medical Research) Intent to Sole Source solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
